name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the prototype-interaction template: static prose describing the interaction — title, a description of the interactive region, the behaviour decisions baked in, and the open questions. The agent renders the open-questions array to a bullet list before substitution.

slots.description: Prose description of the interactive region and how the user manipulates it.
Behaviour decisions baked into the prototype, rendered as prose or a bullet list.
Unresolved interaction questions, rendered as a bullet list.
